title: asplenium pleurosorum
intro: Asplenium pleurosorum, also known as the feather spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Asplenium pleurosorum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Asplenium pleurosorum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its dried leaves can be used in soups and stews.
